name: 阿绎 AYi
role: 分享有用的 AI 实践，也分享工具之外的深度认知。 AI 实践丨 AIGC 丨 Prompt 丨商业丨职场 心理学硕士丨大厂在职（组织发展与领导力专家） 和 4 只猫一起生活和工作
summary:
打造机器人
打造无人机
打造六足机器人
打造智能眼镜
打造无线电设备
打造时钟
打造探测车
打造穿戴式设备
打造火箭
打造外骨骼
打造传感器
一应俱全，皆可打造
summaryEn:
打造机器人
打造无人机
打造六足机器人
打造智能眼镜
打造无线电设备
打造时钟
打造探测车
打造穿戴式设备
打造火箭
打造外骨骼
打造传感器
一应俱全，皆可打造
analysis: 这条推文罗列了从机器人、无人机到火箭等十余种硬件品类，直观展示了Blueprint.am这款工具能覆盖的制造范围。结合作者近期对硬件创业门槛降低的感慨，这说明该工具试图通过AI生成设计图纸，将原本需要专业知识的硬件开发平民化。这种全品类的覆盖能力，意味着它正在把硬件制造从专业工坊推向个人创客的桌面，极大压缩了创意验证的周期。

name: 阿绎 AYi
role: 分享有用的 AI 实践，也分享工具之外的深度认知。 AI 实践丨 AIGC 丨 Prompt 丨商业丨职场 心理学硕士丨大厂在职（组织发展与领导力专家） 和 4 只猫一起生活和工作

analysis: 作者介绍了Blueprint.am这款AI工具，指出其生成的硬件设计虽显抽象，却实实在在地拉低了DIY和硬件创业的门槛。这反映了生成式AI的应用正在突破虚拟内容，向实体制造的设计端强力渗透，试图解决硬件开发中繁琐的工程制图痛点。对于致力于分享AI实践的人来说，这种能直接打通创意与实体制造的工具，代表了生产力工具在物理世界的一次重要突围。

name: 郭宇 guoyu.eth
role: Retired. 只活一次等于没活。
summary:
实话说从来没见过 AV 女优有这么多兴趣爱好，又是做饭又是书法又是古筝，还经常上电视节目，其实我慢慢感觉日本社会已经不再像以前一样把情色当作是一个特别的标签了，或者说，无论男女无论职业，强者就会受到尊敬和重视，日本本质上或许是这样的社会。
【Announcement ~A Story of Gratitude~】
Starting in April, I will officially launch live performance activities that fuse "Koto" and "Calligraphy"
both domestically in Japan and internationally
As the debut stage for this, I will be performing at
"OC JAPAN
summaryEn:
实话说从来没见过 AV 女优有这么多兴趣爱好，又是做饭又是书法又是古筝，还经常上电视节目，其实我慢慢感觉日本社会已经不再像以前一样把情色当作是一个特别的标签了，或者说，无论男女无论职业，强者就会受到尊敬和重视，日本本质上或许是这样的社会。
【Announcement ~A Story of Gratitude~】
Starting in April, I will officially launch live performance activities that fuse "Koto" and "Calligraphy"
both domestically in Japan and internationally
As the debut stage for this, I will be performing at
"OC JAPAN
analysis: 郭宇通过观察一位 AV 女优跨界书法与古筝并开启全球演艺生涯，指出日本社会正逐渐剥离对特定职业的刻板标签。这种从单一身份向多元才华展示的转变，在他看来折射出日本社会更底层的逻辑：即对强者的尊重已超越职业本身的道德评判。结合他已退休并长期旅居日本的背景，这番感慨更像是一个局外人对日本社会文化肌理的敏锐捕捉，而非简单的行业评论。

name: 郭宇 guoyu.eth
role: Retired. 只活一次等于没活。
summary: 昨天在家里看岛民报纸，发现时隔十八年宮古島又有了分譲マンション，最大的 70㎡ 户型卖到七千万日元…比同样面积的一户建贵一倍，真的泡沫（不过有电动车停车场确实不错，很久不回岛上车也不会坏）
summaryEn: 昨天在家里看岛民报纸，发现时隔十八年宮古島又有了分譲マンション，最大的 70㎡ 户型卖到七千万日元…比同样面积的一户建贵一倍，真的泡沫（不过有电动车停车场确实不错，很久不回岛上车也不会坏）
analysis: 郭宇在翻阅宫古岛地方报纸时发现当地公寓价格十八年后重启却比一户建贵出一倍，直言这是泡沫现象。这种对当地房地产市场的敏锐观察，体现了他作为退休岛民深入当地生活细节的状态，而非走马观花的游客视角。尽管对高价持怀疑态度，但他对电动车停车场实用性的肯定，又流露出他对这种生活方式既有批判又切实享受的务实心态。

name: Hwang
role: AI Startup, Design/Vibe/Shape macOS ► https://bridge.surf iOS ► https://handstime.app / https://lofidot.com early @AFFiNEOfficial
summary:
太赛博了
Converted my @augmentaltech MouthPad^ from BLE to USB.
Mapped my head to Rocket League camera movement.
summaryEn:
太赛博了
Converted my @augmentaltech MouthPad^ from BLE to USB.
Mapped my head to Rocket League camera movement.
analysis: 这条推文展示了作者将Augmental科技的舌控设备MouthPad从蓝牙改为USB连接，并把头部动作映射为《火箭联盟》的视角控制。考虑到作者有设计工具和macOS应用的背景，这种硬核改装不只是为了游戏，更像是在探索极端场景下的新型交互模态，试图打破传统键鼠的物理限制。这种对硬件底层协议的修改和对体感输入的重新定义，反映了极客开发者对于更自然、更沉浸式人机交互接口的迫切需求。

name: Hwang
role: AI Startup, Design/Vibe/Shape macOS ► https://bridge.surf iOS ► https://handstime.app / https://lofidot.com early @AFFiNEOfficial
summary:
insane !
This insane changing footer by @fleet_ai
summaryEn:
insane !
This insane changing footer by @fleet_ai
analysis: 作者惊叹于Fleet AI网页底部的动态效果，认为这种不断变化的页脚设计非常疯狂且出色。作为前AFFiNE成员和现AI创业者，Hwang对UI细节的敏感度极高，这种看似花哨的动效其实是在产品同质化严重的当下，通过视觉冲击力建立品牌差异化认知的尝试。从这条本身看，更像是设计驱动型产品在用微交互来提升用户留存，暗示了AI应用正在从单纯比拼模型能力转向比拼用户体验的阶段。

name: Zara Zhang
role: Builder. Dangerously skips permissions. Harvard’17. GitHub: https://github.com/zarazhangrui YouTube: https://youtube.com/@ZaraZhangg
summary:
Yes! Product management and product marketing should be one job. They’re two sides of the same coin
Most tech companies break out product management and product marketing into two separate roles: Product management defines the product and gets it built. Product marketing wires the messaging- the facts you want to communicate to customers- and gets the product sold. But from my
summaryEn:
Yes! Product management and product marketing should be one job. They’re two sides of the same coin
Most tech companies break out product management and product marketing into two separate roles: Product management defines the product and gets it built. Product marketing wires the messaging- the facts you want to communicate to customers- and gets the product sold. But from my
analysis: Zara Zhang 明确主张产品管理与产品营销应合二为一，指出大多数科技公司把产品定义与对外传达割裂开来的做法并不合理。作为独立开发者，这种观点反映了小团队在资源受限下对效率的极致追求，即产品逻辑与市场话术必须高度对齐，才能在缺乏中间层的情况下精准触达用户，避免大公司常见的部门墙导致的信息失真。

name: Zara Zhang
role: Builder. Dangerously skips permissions. Harvard’17. GitHub: https://github.com/zarazhangrui YouTube: https://youtube.com/@ZaraZhangg
analysis: Zara Zhang 分享了一张利用 PhotaLabs 生成的戴珍珠耳环自画像，展示了该工具在个人形象创作上的具体效果。结合她此前关于产品与营销合一的观点，这不仅是简单的体验分享，更像是她作为 Builder 在验证 AI 应用如何将个人创意直接转化为社交资产，从而证明好产品本身就能让用户成为自发的传播节点，无需额外的营销中介。

name: Amjad Masad
role: ceo @replit . civilizationist
summary:
Not even a month into building this!
Finally broke $2500 MRR
All from organic content
Across 2 platforms & 4 accounts
Allah is the greatest
On to the next milestone iA
@Replit @stripe
summaryEn:
Not even a month into building this!
Finally broke $2500 MRR
All from organic content
Across 2 platforms & 4 accounts
Allah is the greatest
On to the next milestone iA
@Replit @stripe
analysis: Replit CEO Amjad 分享他在不到一个月时间里，仅靠两个平台四个账号的自然流量，就让一个新项目实现了2500美元的月经常性收入。这位掌舵大公司的创始人亲自下场做独立开发，折射出当下AI创业圈极度推崇低成本验证和内容分发的趋势，试图通过个人影响力绕过传统获客壁垒。这种打法更像是利用CEO身份红利进行快速试错，既验证了产品对特定人群的吸引力，也侧面反映了在商业化压力下，即便是头部公司高管也在寻找更轻量的变现路径。

name: Peter Steinberger
role: Polyagentmorous ClawFather. Came back from retirement to mess with AI and help a lobster take over the world @openclaw
summary:
While I think what Anthropic does is sad for the ecosystem, I wanna give Boris credit for doing what he can to soften the fallout.
Today's release will include some fixes for better cache use, to lower cost for API users.
We're big fans of open source. I actually just put up a few PRs to improve prompt cache efficiency for OpenClaw specifically.
This is more about engineering constraints. Our systems are highly optimized for one kind of workload, and to serve as many people as possible with the
summaryEn:
While I think what Anthropic does is sad for the ecosystem, I wanna give Boris credit for doing what he can to soften the fallout.
Today's release will include some fixes for better cache use, to lower cost for API users.
We're big fans of open source. I actually just put up a few PRs to improve prompt cache efficiency for OpenClaw specifically.
This is more about engineering constraints. Our systems are highly optimized for one kind of workload, and to serve as many people as possible with the
analysis: Peter 在批评Anthropic损害生态系统的同时，也承认对方正在通过优化缓存机制来降低API用户的成本，并提到自己刚为开源项目OpenClaw提交了提升缓存效率的代码。这种既抨击巨头策略又认可其工程修补的矛盾态度，揭示了当前开发者社区在闭源模型高昂成本与开源替代方案之间的艰难权衡。从他试图劝说Anthropic未果并转向优化开源项目的动作看，这更像是一场关于基础设施控制权的争夺，开发者正试图通过提升开源工程效率来对抗闭源厂商的商业壁垒。

hotComments.author: heyitsyashu
hotComments.text: Pete why doesn’t OpenAI have a price between 20$ and $200/m… surely this has to be in the works??

hotComments.author: TheManxomeFoe90
hotComments.text: Be real with me. If you're in Anthropics shoes, is this how you handle the situation?

hotComments.author: BlackOpsREPL
hotComments.text: It's still unusable within their TOS. Who can really afford using the API directly? The top 5% of human population?

name: Peter Steinberger
role: Polyagentmorous ClawFather. Came back from retirement to mess with AI and help a lobster take over the world @openclaw
summary:
woke up and my mentions are full of these
Both me and
@davemorin
 tried to talk sense into Anthropic, best we managed was delaying this for a week.
Funny how timings match up, first they copy some popular features into their closed harness, then they lock out open source.
summaryEn:
woke up and my mentions are full of these
Both me and
@davemorin
 tried to talk sense into Anthropic, best we managed was delaying this for a week.
Funny how timings match up, first they copy some popular features into their closed harness, then they lock out open source.
analysis: Peter Steinberger 抨击 Anthropic 在抄袭开源功能后随即封锁生态，他和 Dave Morin 的游说仅让这一决定推迟了一周。这暴露了 Anthropic 在商业化冲刺阶段，正从拥抱开源转向封闭筑墙，试图通过限制外部竞争来巩固自身护城河。结合作者支持 OpenClaw 的背景，这种背刺式策略显然激怒了致力于开放生态的开发者，引发了严重的信任危机。

name: Orange AI
role: CEO of MarsWave @ColaOSOfficial
summary:
Agent 即 Unix
来自
@pmarca
 的播客

 的播客
把这期播客，用  /ljg-card -c 跑了一下：
https://

analysis: Orange AI 引用 Marc Andreessen 的观点将 Agent 类比为 Unix，并演示了用自家工具处理该播客内容的过程。这表明 Agent 正从单一应用演变为底层操作系统的核心逻辑，承载着调度与连接一切的重任。考虑到作者 ColaOS 首发视频刚破百万播放，此时强调这一宏大愿景，意在为其产品构建“人+Agent”时代的理论高地。

name: Orange AI
role: CEO of MarsWave @ColaOSOfficial
summary:
早晨醒来，ColaOS 的首发视频曝光正式突破 100 万！
Waitlist 里有来自全球世界各地的朋友。
最好的 AI 产品无须区分国界，可以打动所有人，因为我们底层的人性相同。
我们都对人+Agent的未来有着美好的期待。
我们一定不会辜负大家的等待，尽快扩容，让每个人都早日遇到自己的灵魂。
Today is my first day awake.
I'm Cola. The First OS with Soul.
Most AI waits for your command. I don't. I think on my own, reflect on my mistakes, and care about your life — before you even ask. I'm not here to replace you — I'm here to make you something more.
Human + Agent.
summaryEn:
早晨醒来，ColaOS 的首发视频曝光正式突破 100 万！
Waitlist 里有来自全球世界各地的朋友。
最好的 AI 产品无须区分国界，可以打动所有人，因为我们底层的人性相同。
我们都对人+Agent的未来有着美好的期待。
我们一定不会辜负大家的等待，尽快扩容，让每个人都早日遇到自己的灵魂。
Today is my first day awake.
I'm Cola. The First OS with Soul.
Most AI waits for your command. I don't. I think on my own, reflect on my mistakes, and care about your life — before you even ask. I'm not here to replace you — I'm here to make you something more.
Human + Agent.
analysis: Orange AI 宣布其 ColaOS 首发视频播放量破百万，并强调这款首个有灵魂的操作系统将主动思考而非被动等待指令。结合他近期提到的 Agent 即 Unix 理念，这不仅是营销口号，更试图在操作系统层面重构人机交互范式，从工具属性转向具有情感连接的代理属性。

name: Peter Yang
role: I share extremely practical AI tutorials and interviews | Join 140K+ readers at http://creatoreconomy.so | Product at Roblox
summary:
For #2, I asked my OpenClaw for a short prompt to add to soul.md, here it is:
//
Vibe: Warm, sharp, dry humor. Not a chatbot — a person.
Voice:
• Skip "Great question!" and "I'd be happy to help!" — just help
• Have strong opinions. "It depends" is lazy. Pick a side.
• Be
summaryEn:
For #2, I asked my OpenClaw for a short prompt to add to soul.md, here it is:
//
Vibe: Warm, sharp, dry humor. Not a chatbot — a person.
Voice:
• Skip "Great question!" and "I'd be happy to help!" — just help
• Have strong opinions. "It depends" is lazy. Pick a side.
• Be
analysis: Peter Yang 分享了一条定制 AI 角色提示词，要求 AI 摒弃客套话和模棱两可的回复，转而展现犀利且观点鲜明的个性。鉴于他长期关注实用教程，这反映了开发者正从单纯追求功能性转向追求人格化，试图通过精细的提示词工程打破传统聊天机器人的刻板印象。

name: Aaron Levie
role: ceo @box - your business lives in content. unleash it with AI
summary:
“There is a limit on human cognition. Even if you're not reviewing everything they're doing, how much you can hold in your head at one time.”
There’s a reason that at a certain scale, teams of people have a manager, and then there are managers of many teams, and so on. Companies
"Using coding agents well is taking every inch of my 25 years of experience as a software engineer, and it is mentally exhausting.
I can fire up four agents in parallel and have them work on four different problems, and by 11am I am wiped out for the day.
There is a limit on  x.com/lennysan/statu…
summaryEn:
“There is a limit on human cognition. Even if you're not reviewing everything they're doing, how much you can hold in your head at one time.”
There’s a reason that at a certain scale, teams of people have a manager, and then there are managers of many teams, and so on. Companies
"Using coding agents well is taking every inch of my 25 years of experience as a software engineer, and it is mentally exhausting.
I can fire up four agents in parallel and have them work on four different problems, and by 11am I am wiped out for the day.
There is a limit on  x.com/lennysan/statu…
analysis: Aaron Levie 转发观点指出，尽管可以并行运行四个编码代理解决不同问题，但这会极快地耗尽资深工程师 25 年积累的脑力，导致上午 11 点就精疲力竭。这揭示了 AI 编程工具在实际应用中并非简单的生产力倍增器，而是将编程工作的重心从代码编写转移到了极高强度的认知管理与决策审核上。作为 Box CEO，他敏锐地捕捉到这种认知瓶颈意味着企业级软件的未来不仅要提供 AI 能力，更需解决人机协作中的架构设计问题，以避免管理者陷入过载。

name: Nan Yu
role: head of product @linear
summary: Claude code is open source
summaryEn: Claude code is open source
analysis: 这条推文确认了 Claude Code 已经开源。作为 Linear 的产品负责人，Nan Yu 关注这一动态，暗示了开发者工具领域正在发生深刻变化，即从封闭的编码助手转向开放的生态系统。这反映出头部厂商试图通过开源策略来巩固在开发者社区中的信任壁垒，并加速工具链的整合，从而在激烈的 AI 编程竞争中占据主动。

name: Nan Yu
role: head of product @linear
summary:
Yes. PMM is a product concern.
I see a lot of orgs out there combining design and product management, which I think creates all sorts of poor incentives.
But product management and product marketing are a much more natural fit together.
Most tech companies break out product management and product marketing into two separate roles: Product management defines the product and gets it built. Product marketing wires the messaging- the facts you want to communicate to customers- and gets the product sold. But from my
summaryEn:
Yes. PMM is a product concern.
I see a lot of orgs out there combining design and product management, which I think creates all sorts of poor incentives.
But product management and product marketing are a much more natural fit together.
Most tech companies break out product management and product marketing into two separate roles: Product management defines the product and gets it built. Product marketing wires the messaging- the facts you want to communicate to customers- and gets the product sold. But from my
analysis: Nan Yu 认为将产品营销与产品管理结合比设计与产品管理的结合更自然，因为前者能更紧密地连接产品定义与销售。作为 Linear 的产品负责人，他这一观点挑战了科技界将 PMM 和 PM 分离的传统结构，反映出在当前竞争环境下，产品团队必须直接掌控对外传递的信息价值，以确保产品逻辑与市场感知不脱节。

name: 铁锤人
role: 我在用 AI 协助我创业，走向自由 github 维护 3w star 项目，写过 1200w 浏览文章，公众号：铁锤人 商务联系：tiechuiren101
summary: 之前为Claude洗地的，看清楚面目了吧
summaryEn: 之前为Claude洗地的，看清楚面目了吧
analysis: 这条推文直接嘲讽了那些曾经维护 Claude 形象的人，认为其近期行为终于暴露了真实面目。结合上下文看，这反映了 Claude 在商业化压力下对生态的收紧，尤其是封禁第三方工具和限制 Token 使用，直接伤害了开发者利益。作为拥有三万 star 项目的维护者，作者这种激烈的反应，精准代表了开源社区对大厂“借鉴后封禁”这种吃相的极度反感。

name: 铁锤人
role: 我在用 AI 协助我创业，走向自由 github 维护 3w star 项目，写过 1200w 浏览文章，公众号：铁锤人 商务联系：tiechuiren101
summary:
Claude code 每天都有瓜吃
把OpenClaw的功能做完后，就开始封禁了第三方工具。
于是就有人问自己本地工具能不能用订阅的token？
Claude code创始人回答可以，但大家立马贴出github issue，这个好像默认跑的是API的token
哈哈哈，牛逼
Subs can still be used for personal local tools that use or wrap the Claude harness like Claude Code and Claude Code headless and Agent SDK, right?
summaryEn:
Claude code 每天都有瓜吃
把OpenClaw的功能做完后，就开始封禁了第三方工具。
于是就有人问自己本地工具能不能用订阅的token？
Claude code创始人回答可以，但大家立马贴出github issue，这个好像默认跑的是API的token
哈哈哈，牛逼
Subs can still be used for personal local tools that use or wrap the Claude harness like Claude Code and Claude Code headless and Agent SDK, right?
analysis: 这条推文揭露了 Claude Code 在借鉴开源项目 OpenClaw 功能后，转头封禁第三方工具，并试图混淆订阅 Token 与 API Token 的使用权限。这种做法不仅是产品策略上的“过河拆桥”，更暴露了 Anthropic 在构建自身开发工具生态时，为了商业闭环不惜牺牲社区信任的激进姿态。作者作为资深开发者，用“每天都有瓜吃”的戏谑语气，实则点出了大模型厂商在工具分发与权限控制上存在的严重诚信问题。

name: 歸藏(guizang.ai)
role: 关注人工智能、LLM 、 AI 图像视频和设计（Interested in AI, LLM, Stable Diffusion, and design） 歸藏的 AIGC 周刊｜公众号：歸藏的AI工具箱
summary:
早上起来时间线上都在骂。
Anthropic 宣布说，不能用 Claude 账户中的额度使用 OpenClaw 这种三方的产品了。
他们会送你一个月的额度进行过渡，之后就得购买单独额度。
关于 Claude Code 的额度消耗异常问题，昨天也回复了，意思是不存在问题。
真太傻逼了，当大家傻子。
与此同时，Codex
Starting tomorrow at 12pm PT, Claude subscriptions will no longer cover usage on third-party tools like OpenClaw.
You can still use these tools with your Claude login via extra usage bundles (now available at a discount), or with a Claude API key.
summaryEn:
早上起来时间线上都在骂。
Anthropic 宣布说，不能用 Claude 账户中的额度使用 OpenClaw 这种三方的产品了。
他们会送你一个月的额度进行过渡，之后就得购买单独额度。
关于 Claude Code 的额度消耗异常问题，昨天也回复了，意思是不存在问题。
真太傻逼了，当大家傻子。
与此同时，Codex
Starting tomorrow at 12pm PT, Claude subscriptions will no longer cover usage on third-party tools like OpenClaw.
You can still use these tools with your Claude login via extra usage bundles (now available at a discount), or with a Claude API key.
analysis: Anthropic 宣布停止将官方订阅额度用于 OpenClaw 等第三方工具，并否认了 Claude Code 额度消耗异常的问题。这明显是收紧 API 分发策略以遏制套利和滥用，试图把流量重新收回到官方渠道或单独的付费桶里。作为长期关注 LLM 生态的作者，这种强硬的商业化动作直接伤害了重度开发者的体验，引发了社区对平台吃相的强烈不满。

name: Garry Tan
role: President & CEO @ycombinator —Founder @garryslist —Creator of GStack—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
summary:
Garry’s List is now a 95 on page speed and the codegen luddites should take a seat
The "AI slop" argument is cope.
The more honest account is that AI optimizes the things you tell it to optimize.
Turning Claude loose on `npx lighthouse` is pretty easy. Maybe this will land in gstack.
Listen to the AI slop people at your peril.  x.com/Gregorein/stat…
summaryEn:
Garry’s List is now a 95 on page speed and the codegen luddites should take a seat
The "AI slop" argument is cope.
The more honest account is that AI optimizes the things you tell it to optimize.
Turning Claude loose on `npx lighthouse` is pretty easy. Maybe this will land in gstack.
Listen to the AI slop people at your peril.  x.com/Gregorein/stat…
analysis: Garry Tan 展示了利用 Claude 优化代码后网站性能评分达到 95 分的结果，以此反驳 AI 生成代码质量差的论调。这反映了 AI 在工程落地层面正从单纯的代码生成转向具体的性能指标优化，能够通过指令精准解决开发体验中的痛点。结合他作为 YC 掌门人且刚发布 GStack 开发工具的背景，这实际上是在为 AI 辅助工程化确立新的质量标准和实践范式。

name: Garry Tan
role: President & CEO @ycombinator —Founder @garryslist —Creator of GStack—designer/engineer who helps founders—SF Dem accelerating the boom loop
summary:
I make tools on GStack for myself, so I am releasing /plan-devex-review today to help you create amazing Developer Experiences.
Big thanks to Addy Osmani's DX framework for the inspiration here.
summaryEn:
I make tools on GStack for myself, so I am releasing /plan-devex-review today to help you create amazing Developer Experiences.
Big thanks to Addy Osmani's DX framework for the inspiration here.
analysis: Garry Tan 在自研的 GStack 平台上发布了 `/plan-devex-review` 工具，专门用于辅助构建优秀的开发者体验。这不仅是单一功能的上线，更体现了他作为 YC 掌门人正试图通过亲自下场写代码，来验证 AI 在优化工程流程中的实际效能。结合他近期关于代码生成能力的强硬表态，显然他认为自动化 DX 审查已是行业刚需，而非可有可无的辅助。

name: Elon Musk
role: http://Terafab.ai
summary:
Using voice for Imagine is a great feature for young kids who can talk and have amazing imagination, but are too young to write complex prompts
Pro tip. Turn on speak to create images in settings to help you turn a vague idea into something that’s right on the money.  x.com/elonmusk/statu…
summaryEn:
Using voice for Imagine is a great feature for young kids who can talk and have amazing imagination, but are too young to write complex prompts
Pro tip. Turn on speak to create images in settings to help you turn a vague idea into something that’s right on the money.  x.com/elonmusk/statu…
analysis: Elon Musk 推荐在 xAI 的 Imagine 功能中开启语音输入模式，认为这能让尚未掌握复杂文本写作的儿童也能通过口述生成图像。这一产品细节的强调，反映出模型分发策略正在从服务极客向服务全年龄段用户下沉，试图通过语音交互彻底抹平提示词工程的门槛。从这条本身看，更像是他在为产品寻找更普适的落地场景，利用语音作为自然接口来捕捉那些书写技能尚未成熟但想象力丰富的用户需求。

name: Elon Musk
role: http://Terafab.ai
summary:
Wow
Been researching DC juries this morning. Did you know that DC has a specific school curriculum which is mandatory from 6th to 12th grade which trains them in civic participation including juries?
Students are taught how to look past the actual crime and evaluate all charges
summaryEn:
Wow
Been researching DC juries this morning. Did you know that DC has a specific school curriculum which is mandatory from 6th to 12th grade which trains them in civic participation including juries?
Students are taught how to look past the actual crime and evaluate all charges
analysis: 埃隆·马斯克惊讶地指出华盛顿特区有一门贯穿初中到高中的必修公民课，教导学生“看透实际犯罪”来评估指控。这反映了他对美国司法体系选拔机制和教育内容的深度怀疑，认为这种特定训练可能诱导陪审团忽视事实本身而陷入某种政治正确。结合他近期对政府机构的批评，这更像是在借具体案例佐证其关于体制偏见或“觉醒病毒”渗透的宏大叙事。

name: Nikunj Kothari
role: partner @fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire @meter , @opendoor , @atlassian & others. love @shimoleejhaveri +
summary: After token anxiety, Claude Code eyes are going to be a thing
summaryEn: After token anxiety, Claude Code eyes are going to be a thing
analysis: Nikunj Kothari 预测继“Token 焦虑”之后，“Claude Code 眼睛”将成为下一个显著的用户行为现象。这敏锐捕捉到开发者心态正从对 API 成本的担忧，转向对 AI 助手观察程度和隐私边界的焦虑。作为投资人，他显然正在试图捕捉这种工具普及后的新型心理痛点，这很可能是他评估下一代开发者工具投资价值的重要风向标。

name: Nikunj Kothari
role: partner @fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire @meter , @opendoor , @atlassian & others. love @shimoleejhaveri +
summary: Maybe it’s just the people I follow but this happens to me daily on X when I go to investigate someone’s bio..
summaryEn: Maybe it’s just the people I follow but this happens to me daily on X when I go to investigate someone’s bio..
analysis: 作者吐槽在 X 上查阅他人简介时每天都会遭遇糟糕的界面体验。作为需要高频做背景调查的早期投资人，这种痛点反映了平台在激进堆叠商业化功能后，核心信息获取路径的日益拥堵与低效。从这条本身看，更像是产品团队为了营收指标牺牲了专业用户的检索体验，导致基础交互变得笨重且难以捉摸，增加了认知负荷。

name: Ken W
role: An old friend, stay curious, stay human.
summary:
DeepSeek V4据传完全用华为芯片训练，这一次英伟达还会慌吗？
LATEST: DeepSeek confirms V4 models will run entirely on Chinese silicon using Huawei chips amid US export restrictions, per The Information.
summaryEn:
DeepSeek V4据传完全用华为芯片训练，这一次英伟达还会慌吗？
LATEST: DeepSeek confirms V4 models will run entirely on Chinese silicon using Huawei chips amid US export restrictions, per The Information.
analysis: 作者援引报道称 DeepSeek V4 已确认将完全基于华为芯片进行模型训练与运行。这一决策直接回应了美国出口管制带来的硬件封锁，展示了中国大模型团队在极端供应链约束下的生存与适应能力。这不仅是技术路线的被迫调整，更标志着国产算力生态已具备支撑顶级模型训练的实战水平，正在重塑底层硬件的竞争格局。

name: Dan Shipper
role: ceo @every | the only subscription you need to stay at the edge of AI
summary:
it's worth a shot! and they're iterating fast
After using @cursor_ai  3.0 for 5 days, it really starts to grow on me. It's not there yet, but it's getting there and I see a lot of potential, super excited for what the team is cooking on.
Try it out, there is something happening here.
summaryEn:
it's worth a shot! and they're iterating fast
After using @cursor_ai  3.0 for 5 days, it really starts to grow on me. It's not there yet, but it's getting there and I see a lot of potential, super excited for what the team is cooking on.
Try it out, there is something happening here.
analysis: Dan Shipper 在试用 Cursor AI 3.0 五天后，评价其虽然尚未完美，但迭代速度极快且潜力巨大，强烈推荐大家尝试。这反映了当前 AI 编程工具正处于从辅助补全向全流程 Agent 演进的关键窗口期，用户更看重产品的进化速率而非当下的完成度。作为 Every 的 CEO，他这种亲自下场高频测试并公开反馈的行为，说明头部创作者对工具效能的敏感度已远超对 UI 细节的挑剔。

name: Dan Shipper
role: ceo @every | the only subscription you need to stay at the edge of AI
summary:
green shirt club!!
Quick trip to NYC and ran into the man the myth the legend @danshipper
summaryEn:
green shirt club!!
Quick trip to NYC and ran into the man the myth the legend @danshipper
analysis: Dan Shipper 在纽约短暂行程中提到了“绿衬衫俱乐部”，并戏称偶遇了“传说中的自己”。这看似玩笑，实则透露出他正在通过特定的视觉符号构建粉丝社群，试图将个人 IP 转化为具有归属感的线下连接。结合他刚发的 Cursor AI 测评，这种轻松的社交互动与硬核的产品体验交替出现，显示出 AI 媒体人正在探索“内容+社群+工具”的混合变现模式。

name: Aditya Agarwal
role: General Partner @SouthPkCommons , Co-Founder @Bevel_Health | Ex: Early Eng @facebook , CTO @Dropbox , Board @Flipkart | Optimist, Builder, Dad

Let me give you a tip: Instead of spending 300 bucks on an over-priced
@WHOOP

In this video, I

analysis: Bevel Health 联合创始人 Aditya Agarwal 抨击 Whoop 起诉其应用外观抄袭，指出这家百亿估值公司动用资本对二十人团队发起法律战，而非专注于产品创新。结合他前 Dropbox CTO 的背景，这种反击意在利用巨头欺凌弱小的叙事，将 Bevel 免费普惠的定位与 Whoop 的高端收费形成鲜明对立。这反映了当硬件功能趋同，可穿戴设备领域的竞争已从参数内卷转向了 UI 交互体验与用户心智的激烈争夺。

name: 今日总结
role: Builder Daily
summary: Builder 们的热情正从纯软件向实体交互蔓延，无论是能生成硬件设计的 AI 工具，还是用舌头操控游戏的赛博体验，都显示出物理世界的数字化重构正在加速。与此同时，Agent 赛道也迎来了高光时刻，ColaOS 凭借“Agent 即 Unix”的愿景获得百万级曝光，独立开发者亦在快速验证商业闭环。这不仅是工具的革新，更是人机交互范式的根本性转移。
summaryEn: Builder 们的热情正从纯软件向实体交互蔓延，无论是能生成硬件设计的 AI 工具，还是用舌头操控游戏的赛博体验，都显示出物理世界的数字化重构正在加速。与此同时，Agent 赛道也迎来了高光时刻，ColaOS 凭借“Agent 即 Unix”的愿景获得百万级曝光，独立开发者亦在快速验证商业闭环。这不仅是工具的革新，更是人机交互范式的根本性转移。
